quote: 人生就像一盒巧克力，你永远不知道下一颗是什么味道。
author: 阿甘正传

quote: 曾经有一份真挚的爱情摆在我面前，我没有珍惜，等到失去的时候才后悔莫及。
author: 大话西游

quote: 给我一个支点，我可以撬起整个地球。
author: 阿基米德

quote: 天才是1%的灵感加上99%的汗水。
author: 爱迪生

quote: 锲而不舍，金石可镂。
author: 荀子

quote: 知之为知之，不知为不知，是知也。
author: 孔子

quote: 我思故我在。
author: 笛卡尔

quote: 书籍是人类进步的阶梯。
author: 高尔基

quote: 读万卷书，行万里路。
author: 董其昌

quote: 生活中不是缺少美，而是缺少发现美的眼睛。
author: 罗丹

quote: 音乐是比一切智慧、一切哲学更高的启示。
author: 贝多芬

quote: 路漫漫其修远兮，吾将上下而求索。
author: 屈原

quote: You will never have what you like until you learn to like what you have.
author: Johann Wolfgang von Goethe

quote: Talk is cheap, Show me the code.
author: Linus Benedict Torvalds

quote: All social life is essentially practical.
author: Albert Einstein

quote: Genius is formed in quiet, character in the stream of life.
author: Johann Wolfgang von Goethe

quote: Optimistic person eternal youth.
author: George Gordon Byron

quote: To spark, often burst in hard stone.
author: William Liebknecht

quote: Whether it is the old man, or the young, it is the last time for us to sail.
author: Robert Louis Stevenson

quote: Is the true wisdom fortitude ambition.
author: Napoleon Bonaparte

quote: Nutrition books in the world. There is no book in life, there is no sunlight; wisdom without books, as if the birds do not have wings.
author: William Shakespeare

quote: The best advice for young people is to make them modest and prudent, honor their parents, and love their relatives and friends.
author: Cicero

quote: The body is always in the end. In addition to thinking, there is no beautiful and interesting things to stay, because thought is life.
author: Bernard Shaw

quote: Time is like surging rapids, it also did not want to.
author: Cervantes Saavedra

quote: Continuous labor is the life of the iron law, also the art of iron.
author: Honore de Balzac

quote: Only people's social practice is the standard of the truth that people know about the outside world. The standard of truth can only be social practice.
author: Mao Zedong
